summary:
The agent concludes that αCGRP is indeed part of the CGRP family based on established knowledge linking α-CGRP as an isoform within the larger CGRP group. This classification aligns with both structural and functional data showing shared signaling pathways through CLR and therapeutic targets aimed at blocking CGRP activity across variants.  

(Note: Summary does NOT include any non-clinical content.)

→ States clearly that α-CGRP falls under the broader CGRP family due to shared biology and therapy relevance
